nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Claude Code agent-skill manifest for the Mediabunny multimedia library, giving a compact overview and linking out to task-specific how-to docs for audio duration, video dimensions, and video duration. This is bundled third-party skill documentation under agent/skills/, not versus-engine's own application code.

nodes.name: get-audio-duration.md
nodes.summary: External reference doc showing how to compute an audio file's duration in seconds with Mediabunny's Input/UrlSource API, including staticFile usage in Remotion and FileSource usage in Node.js/Bun.

nodes.name: get-video-dimensions.md
nodes.summary: External reference doc explaining how to read a video's width and height via Mediabunny's primary video track, covering remote URLs, local FileSource files, and Remotion staticFile paths.

nodes.name: get-video-duration.md
nodes.summary: External reference doc demonstrating how to compute a video file's duration in seconds using Mediabunny's Input.computeDuration(), including public/ staticFile usage in Remotion and Node.js/Bun FileSource usage.
